Cloud Engineer.day_in_life: Architecting AWS/Azure infrastructure, managing Kubernetes clusters, and automating deployments using Terraform.
Cloud Engineer.growth: Senior Cloud Architect → VP of Engineering
Cloud Engineer.prep: Focus on AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.

Cyber Security Analyst.day_in_life: Monitoring network traffic for security breaches, conducting penetration testing, and writing incident response reports.
Cyber Security Analyst.prep: Master CEH, CompTIA Security+, Network Protocols, and Wireshark.

Data Scientist.day_in_life: Cleaning massive datasets, building predictive ML models in Python, and presenting insights to stakeholders.
Data Scientist.growth: Lead Data Scientist → Head of Data
Data Scientist.prep: Strong Python (Pandas/Scikit-learn), SQL, Mathematics, and A/B Testing.

Full-Stack Developer.day_in_life: Building responsive React frontend interfaces and designing scalable Node.js/Python backend APIs.
Full-Stack Developer.growth: Senior Developer → Tech Lead → Engineering Manager
Full-Stack Developer.prep: Build end-to-end projects. Master React/Vue, Node/Django, and SQL/NoSQL databases.

Product Manager.day_in_life: Running daily scrums, analyzing user metrics, and bridging the gap between engineering and business teams.
Product Manager.prep: Learn Agile/Scrum, Jira, data analytics, and practice system design for PMs.

UI/UX Designer.day_in_life: Creating wireframes in Figma, conducting user research interviews, and designing high-fidelity prototypes.
UI/UX Designer.prep: Build a strong portfolio. Master Figma, user flow diagrams, and accessibility standards.
